name: orchestration.abort transitions loop to ABORTED_BY_OWNER; audit log preserved with schema-pure ABORT row
description: End-to-end tool invocation test via the default registry. Sequence: (1) orchestration.start_loop creates a fresh loop (random loop_id for run isolation), (2) orchestration.abort transitions state to ABORTED_BY_OWNER and writes an ABORT audit row, (3) orchestration.get_status confirms current_state=ABORTED_BY_OWNER, (4) orchestration.read_log confirms the audit log is readable and contains an ABORT row with all required schema fields (ts, loop_id, from_state, to_state, transition_type, mock, cost_usd). Verifies that abort does not corrupt the log (log_preserved) and leaves a non-empty audit trail (log_row_count_positive).
